description: Resolve orphaned neural-network predictor module — GitHub trovlunde/stock_analyzer#4

userStories.title: Audit nn_predictor public API and callers
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the nn_predictor module surface documented before rewrite so public contracts are preserved and scope stays bounded.
acceptanceCriteria: Confirm train_nn_predictor, predict_returns, and prepare_data are the public entry points to preserve
Confirm module is not imported by daily job, evaluate CLI, or other production paths
Document return contracts (model, scaler, history tuple; predict_returns Series index alignment) in scripts/ralph/progress.txt
uv run pytest passes

userStories.title: Rewrite training with sklearn MLPRegressor
userStories.description: As a developer on a clean uv sync, I want nn_predictor to train without TensorFlow so import and training work with declared dependencies only.
acceptanceCriteria: Remove tensorflow, keras, and keras_tuner imports from nn_predictor module
train_nn_predictor uses sklearn.neural_network.MLPRegressor with early_stopping for comparable feed-forward regression
do_tuning=True uses sklearn-native search (GridSearchCV or RandomizedSearchCV) over MLP hyperparameters — not keras-tuner Hyperband
No keras_tuner/ directory creation or TensorFlow-specific APIs remain
uv run pytest passes

userStories.title: Adapt predict and visualization for sklearn API
userStories.description: As a developer using nn_predictor after the rewrite, I want predict_returns and training charts to work with sklearn models instead of Keras history objects.
acceptanceCriteria: predict_returns calls sklearn model.predict on scaled features and returns pd.Series aligned to prepared feature index
Training visualization uses sklearn loss_curve_ or equivalent — not keras history.history
Remove tf.nn.softmax debug print and any dead Keras-only code paths
Public signatures of train_nn_predictor and predict_returns unchanged
uv run pytest passes

userStories.title: Add pytest for import and synthetic training
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want regression tests that prove nn_predictor imports and trains on fixture data without network calls.
acceptanceCriteria: New test under tests/ imports train_nn_predictor without ModuleNotFoundError
Test builds synthetic OHLCV DataFrame (Close, Volume columns, enough rows for rolling features)
Test calls train_nn_predictor with do_tuning=False and asserts model, scaler, history returned
Test calls predict_returns and asserts Series length matches prepared feature rows
No yfinance or live market API calls in tests
uv run pytest passes

userStories.title: Update README for sklearn MLP backend
userStories.description: As a developer reading project docs, I want README to match what uv sync actually installs for nn_predictor.
acceptanceCriteria: Remove tensorflow and keras from required dependency list in README
nn_predictor module docs state sklearn MLPRegressor backend
Note module is experimental and not wired into stock-analysis-daily or stock-analysis-evaluate
uv run pytest passes
